item.title: How to troll neo-Nazis
item.description: Today in the German city of Osnabrück around 1,500 protesters peacefully surrounded a promotion stand of the neo-Nazi party AfD. The people at the stand could get out, but nobody could reach the stand. Trolling and finger pointing out Nazis seems to become a rapidly growing trend in Germany.
item.dc:creator: Che07

item.title: I just stole this video from a comment by trippingthelightfantastic because I wanted to run the numbers…so here are the numbers. Just the facts.
item.description: Edited to add - The gentleman speaking is Anand Giridharadas. https://www.radcliffe.harvard.edu/people/anand-giridharadas The estimated cost of Medicare for All is around USD 32 trillion dollars over 10 years. https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7438128/#:~:text=The%20estimated%20cost%20of%20Medicare,unlikely%20to%20come%20to%20pass. Student loan debt in the United States totals $1.773 trillion. https://educationdata.org/student-loan-debt-statistics#:~:text=Student%20loan%20debt%20in%20the,borrowers%20have%20federal%20loan%20debt. Free college program. $58.2 Billion for the first year and $800 billion over the next 10 years. The government fully covers the cost of tuition and fees at a public college, allowing students to use any additional financial aid to cover other costs of attendance, such as room and board, books, and transportation. Such a plan with no restrictions on student eligibility would cost $58.2 billion in the first year and $799.7 billion over an additional 10 years https://cew.georgetown.edu/cew-reports/freecollegecost/ Universal Child Care $70 Billion per year. https://www.warren.senate.gov/imo/media/doc/Universal_Child_Care_Policy_Brief_2019.pdf 20 trillion$. Net Worth Held by the top 0.1%. (240,000 people) https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/WFRBLTP1246 Average annual income of the top 0.1%. —. $35 million. 90% = $31.5M https://www.chicagobooth.edu/review/never-mind-1-percent-lets-talk-about-001-percent Total income of the top 0.1% - $8.4 Trillion. 90% = $7.56T First year costs = $5.123 Trillion $3.35 Trillion every year after. 50% income tax rate pays $4.2 Trillion Currently, the top 1% (couldn’t find data on the top 0.1%) pay half of all income taxes - about $1.2 Trillion; this amount would still have to be collected on top of any new tax. https://taxfoundation.org/data/all/federal/latest-federal-income-tax-data-2024/ 2.4 million people in the top 1% with an average income of $790,000. Currently the top 1% pay an average tax rate of 26% plus any foreign tax. It’s doable, without a lot of pain, and no impact on net worth. Just income. Get rid of the income loopholes and tax away. It would work. Now write and call your congresspersons. Good luck, kids.
item.dc:creator: charondaboatman

item.title: Intentionally Left Blanc by Hank Thomas
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: Brooke Harrington, economical sociologist, muses with Jon Stewart on the Broligarchy
item.description:
She started in wealth management. Which is only for the 1%ers
After 17 years of studying stealth wealth, she wrote a book on what wealthy economics looks like behind the scenes Sub Rosa - under the rose, done in secret
Karl Marx said the most dangerous group is an educated proletariat. He also said wide social change is possible when class conscious proletariat work together with class conscious bourgeoisie.
How interested would imgur be in social science communication content? Application, understanding, explanations, studies of the sciences of cooperation and conflict? https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=DvCmBOenfsQ someone make a hyperlink lol
item.dc:creator: StellaMatutina

item.title: LOL, apocalypse-proof!
item.description: Don't know what's funnier... him still owing $171k on what was a $130k vehicle at the time, or expecting insurance to cover his "broker fee". Or maybe it's the indestructible vehicle being totaled by an e-scooter.
item.dc:creator: PileOfWalthers

item.title: Forgetting the Past
item.description:
https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn8x195dnlro ""Seeing a concentration camp with my own eyes and listening to a survivor who went through it all, that's really brought it home. It's important for young people like me. We'll soon be able to vote. The far right is gaining more and more support in Germany and we need to learn from the past." [...] Eighteen-year-old Melike admitted she didn't know much about the Holocaust before coming to Dachau. Listening to Eva Umlauf, a survivor, talk about what happened, touched her heart, she said."
https://www.cbc.ca/news/world/holocaust-anniversary-1.7442237 "[...] A ceremony that is widely being treated as the last major observance that any notable number of survivors will be able to attend."
https://www.nbcnews.com/news/world/elon-musks-call-germany-move-nazi-guilt-dangerous-holocaust-memorial-c-rcna189316 "“There is too much focus on past guilt, and we need to move beyond that,” he [Musk] added at the rally in the eastern German city of Halle." ... Hmm, it's almost like this guy is *encouraging* folks to forget about their history. How odd that this awkward-gesture-making feller would do that... Concerning!

item.title: I changed my name!
item.description: So much happened since my first post on this account last april. Everything happened so fast and also not nearly fast enough. I also came out at work yesterday, which means I am now 100% out of the closet. You people kickstarted it all, thank you so much again. Next step hrt! (If I manage to get an appointment at some point...) Completely unrelated but Imagine Dragons released a new (old) song called Monica. Go listen to it, its great!
item.dc:creator: ObviousThrowawayAccountIsObviouslyNot

item.title: I will never understand how people can utterly lack empathy
item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: Auschwitz was unimaginable. Treblinka was even worse.
item.description: It was the second-deadliest camp behind Auschwitz, "only" 900,000 humans died there…but unlike Auschwitz, there was no work done there. It was literally a place created to kill. Auschwitz was 350+ acres, with all sorts of slave workshops. Treblinka was at most 42 acres. The only facilities were to kill, and burn. No work, no slavery, only death. Shooting fields and crematoriums. The horror of mankind is truly unlimited.
item.dc:creator: PballQhead

item.title: Guess you should've held the light still.
item.dc:creator: TypicallyMisjudged

item.title: Late Night Sky on Mars
item.description: New Edit: Definitely just intended as inspiring art, then got passed off as real on social media. Real mars footage stiched with Earth sky that was embellished. Thanks to @Dhalmelpunch letting us know the video was made by someone going by "Hugh Hou" (huehue) https://www.indiatimes.com/technology/news/360-degree-panorama-of-mars-nasa-perseverance-rover-535052.html Edit: @glovelyday called this out as fake in comments so I did some quick digging. Though I can't find this exact video being declared fake, it is even higher resolution than others being called fake. They say it is real mars footage stitched with real Earth sky footage. Those providing support for the claim that it is fake may just be non-authorities asserting opinion as fact, so not a smoking gun, but they are amateur astronomers and raise some plausible arguments. Also I can't find it on an official site. I found it on social media. I am neither convinced it's real or fake. I now lean towards fake. I still think it's beautiful and and enjoy it, and am hopeful that it's real.
item.dc:creator: ChewieQuixote12ParsecsDeepInAnElbow

item.title: Memes vol 478
item.description:
This is such a me meme- a MEme if you will
I asked my boyfriend the other day “how does it feel to be dating the person with the most perfect music taste in all of existence?” and he laughed in my face because he doesn’t like musicals but the man likes Travis Scott who’s favorite line is “it’s lit!” So like…
Ooohhh I should go make Cheetos Mac and cheese
This is gonna me me cry it’s so cute
Fly high, little spud
SAM AND QUINN RAAAAAAAAHHHH STEVE AND ROBIN RAAAAGHHGH
Scruffy tax
Liza Jane and Froggy tax
Nessie tax- look at this cunty queen. https://imgur.com/gallery/ECyXlI5

item.title: Have a lil' break (or don't)
item.description:
Many things suck, right now. We can't bury our heads in the sand about it all, but a short break is not bad for your health ❤ Here are some things.
Only two (2) of them
#isntthisafuturamaepisode
oh no.
It is nearly impossible
Hm. Sounds right.
TAX BENEFITS
"Family sized". HA!
( ♥‿♥)
\m/
Sailor #1: Look! Is land! Write that down! Sailor #2: Writing it down, but with terrible kerning.
123 countries in the world were McDonald's-less, in 2023. They will be the resistance.
The Old English hadn't met Gary, had they
Purgatory probably.
I'm purgatory perhaps probably planning
Good Guy Shark (◠◡◠)
The little bag tied to a stick is called a "bindle"
Like caterpillars to butterflies, I assume the cookies just turn into sewing supplies at some point after having been encased in their tin cocoon
Yaaas queeen of blurry photos
Throwback commercial reference: "I peench"
Because it's so cool. Garlic is the coolest.
Duck yeah
This comes from the guy in the previous picture
It is in the butt. Happiness.
Butt real estate (I bet they're happy)
See? You're worth it ❤
I operate this way.
oh no.
OH NO.
Ah yes, we love the game
...And this game too!
"Cleansing and reapplying the runes anew" will often solve the problem TBH
Damn flashy wizards
They screm ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
Ah yes, there it is.
That's the spirit.
ᶜᵒᶻʸ ˡⁱˡ' ˢⁿᵉᵏ
CUTENESS.
The buggies need them, and we keep messing it up.
"Driver's License Filter"
Illegitimi non carborundum (Mock-Latin for: "don't let the bastards get you down")
Your did it ❤
...-EEEE-EYYYYYYYYE
oh no.
Everyone will be issues a script that they will be required to follow (or be haunted)
Dat good clicky-clacky
I would watch this show very much.
Challenge yourself! Why not 20%! Go for 100%!
Just in case.
HA HA this makes me laugh every time Keep up the good work, crocodiles!
Eff that. Smile and then frown and then smile and then frown - continuously, all day. Make everyone worried or at least mildly terrified.
100% feral (ツ) HAVE A NICE WEEK.
